entries.name: The Fool (0)
entries.description: New beginnings, innocence, spontaneity. Traditional Rider-Waite interpretation.

entries.name: The Magician (I)
entries.description: Manifestation, resourcefulness, power. Traditional Rider-Waite interpretation.

entries.name: The High Priestess (II)
entries.description: Intuition, sacred knowledge, divine feminine. Traditional Rider-Waite interpretation.

entries.name: The Empress (III)
entries.description: Femininity, beauty, nature, abundance. Traditional Rider-Waite interpretation.

entries.name: Hexagram 1: Qian
entries.description: The Creative - Heaven. Authentic interpretation from Wilhelm translation.

entries.name: Hexagram 2: Kun
entries.description: The Receptive - Earth. Authentic interpretation from Wilhelm translation.

entries.name: Hexagram 3: Zhun
entries.description: Difficulty at the Beginning - Water over Thunder. Authentic interpretation from Wilhelm translation.

entries.name: Hexagram 4: Meng
entries.description: Youthful Folly - Mountain over Water. Authentic interpretation from Wilhelm translation.
